title: Moonlight Sonata
writer: E.M. Delafield, Edward Knoblock, Hans Rameau
actors: Ignacy Jan Paderewski, Charles Farrell, Marie Tempest
plot: Mr. Paderewski performs classical piano works including Beethoven's "Moonlight Sonata", which enhances the bond between two young lovers, just as his having previously played this same lovely melody had brought the girl's parents ...
